title: Nasha Mukt Vidyalaya Initiative
description: Source: PIB Subject: Government Scheme Context: The Ministry of Education has issued a comprehensive 3-year Action Plan for the Nasha Mukt Vidyalaya initiative to eliminate substance abuse in schools. About Nasha Mukt Vidyalaya Initiative: What it is?
